name: mitii-ai-agent
description: Local-first VS Code AI coding agent with precise repo context and safe Plan/Act workflow

thunder.debug.description: Enable debug logging and show stack traces in UI

thunder.telemetry.sessionLogging.description: Write structured JSONL session logs to .mitii/logs/ for debugging and analysis.

thunder.telemetry.debugMetrics.description: Capture extra session diagnostics (tool inputs, context sources, LLM step metadata). Process timing is always logged when session logging is on.

thunder.provider.contextWindow.description: Model context window size. Thunder trims prompts automatically to stay within this limit.

thunder.indexing.autoIndexOnOpen.description: Automatically index the workspace when a folder is opened or switched.

thunder.indexing.maxFileSizeBytes.description: Max file size for full indexing in bytes. Larger files get signature-only indexing.

thunder.indexing.hardSkipSizeBytes.description: Skip files larger than this size entirely (e.g. lockfiles).

thunder.indexing.maxConcurrency.description: Number of files to index in parallel.

thunder.indexing.vectorsEnabled.description: Enable semantic vector search. Uses MiniLM when @xenova/transformers is available, hash fallback otherwise.

thunder.indexing.treeSitterEnabled.description: Use tree-sitter WASM for symbol extraction (regex fallback when unavailable)

thunder.indexing.embeddingProvider.description: Embedding provider when vectors are enabled. minilm uses local @xenova/transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2); falls back to hash if unavailable.

thunder.indexing.vectorBackend.description: Vector index storage: sqlite (.mitii/mitii.sqlite) or lancedb (.mitii/lance/) via @lancedb/lancedb

thunder.context.rerankerEnabled.description: Rerank top retrieval candidates for better context quality (top-20 → top-8)

thunder.context.rerankerCandidatePool.description: Number of candidates to pass to the reranker

thunder.context.rerankerTopK.description: Number of items to keep after reranking

enumDescriptions: Ask before file edits and mutating shell commands.
Ask before file edits and delete-like shell commands; allow other mutating shell commands.
Ask only before delete-like shell commands; allow file edits and other commands.
Ask before mutating shell commands; allow file edits.
Auto-approve allowed tools and commands. Dangerous commands are still blocked.

thunder.memory.hybridSearchEnabled.description: Use FTS5 + optional vector hybrid search for observations

thunder.scm.commitMessageEnabled.description: Show Mitii commit-message generation in VS Code Source Control.

thunder.github.issueFetchEnabled.description: Fetch structured GitHub issue context when a chat message contains a github.com owner/repo/issues URL and network access is allowed.

thunder.github.issueCommentLimit.description: Maximum number of GitHub issue comments to include in injected issue context.

thunder.github.tokenRef.description: VS Code SecretStorage key for an optional GitHub token used to fetch private issues. The token itself is not stored in settings.

thunder.agent.subagentsEnabled.description: Enable the spawn_research_agent tool for parallel read-only research.

thunder.agent.maxSteps.description: Maximum tool-use steps before the main agent stops or auto-continues.

thunder.agent.askMaxSteps.description: Maximum tool-use steps per Ask-mode turn (read-only exploration). Use 16-20 for deep codebase explanations.

thunder.agent.askDepth.description: Ask-mode exploration depth. Auto chooses by intent; quick is concise; deep explores more before answering.

thunder.agent.planDepth.description: Plan-mode discovery depth before structured plan compilation. Auto chooses by intent; deep explores more of the codebase.

thunder.agent.actDepth.description: Agent/Act execution depth. Auto chooses by task route; quick caps direct work, deep allows up to 16 tool steps.

thunder.agent.askAutoContinue.description: Allow Ask mode to continue when deep exploration reaches its per-round limit.

thunder.agent.askMaxAutoContinues.description: Maximum automatic continuation rounds for Ask mode.

thunder.agent.autoContinue.description: Allow the agent to keep working after it reaches the per-round step limit.

thunder.agent.maxAutoContinues.description: Maximum number of automatic continuation rounds after the main step limit.

thunder.agent.researchAgentMaxSteps.description: Maximum tool-use steps for each read-only research subagent.

thunder.agent.researchAgentModel.description: Optional faster model for read-only research subagents. Empty uses the main provider model.

thunder.agent.researchAgentBaseUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for the research subagent model. Empty uses thunder.provider.baseUrl.

thunder.agent.orchestrationEnabled.description: Enable the multi-step planner in Plan mode. Act mode uses a faster direct agent path by default.

thunder.agent.showDiffPreview.description: Open VS Code diff preview tabs before write_file/apply_patch tool calls. Disabled by default to avoid editor focus changes.

thunder.agent.verifyCommands.description: Read-only shell commands to run at the end of Act-mode agent runs (e.g. lint, test).

thunder.agent.verifyOnActComplete.description: Run thunder.agent.verifyCommands after Act-mode agent runs complete.

thunder.agent.planModel.description: Optional model override for Plan mode. Empty uses thunder.provider.model.

thunder.agent.planBaseUrl.description: Optional base URL override for Plan mode.

thunder.agent.actModel.description: Optional model override for Agent (Act) mode. Empty uses thunder.provider.model.

thunder.agent.actBaseUrl.description: Optional base URL override for Agent (Act) mode.

thunder.agent.checkpointStrategy.description: Checkpoint strategy before file writes. Git stash when repo available, else file copy.

thunder.safety.allowUntrustedWorkspace.description: Allow writes and shell in untrusted workspaces (not recommended).

thunder.mcp.enabled.description: Enable Model Context Protocol servers. Built-in free servers start automatically unless thunder.mcp.preloadBuiltin is false.

thunder.mcp.preloadBuiltin.description: Preload official free MCP servers (filesystem, memory, sequential-thinking) on extension startup. Toggle individual servers in the Mitii settings UI.

thunder.mcp.builtinServers.description: Default on/off state for built-in MCP servers. Per-session toggles are available in the Mitii Integrations settings tab.

thunder.mcp.maxConcurrentStartup.description: Maximum MCP stdio servers Mitii starts at the same time.

thunder.mcp.servers.description: MCP server definitions keyed by server name. Supports stdio servers: { "my-server": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "."] } }

thunder.workspace.rootPathOverride.description: Fallback workspace root when no VS Code folder is open. When a folder is open, Mitii always uses that folder and ignores this setting.

scripts.compile: npm run compile:extension && npm run compile:webview
scripts.rebuild:all: npm run rebuild:native && npm run rebuild:node
scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('Run npm run rebuild:native before F5 if better-sqlite3 fails to load')"
scripts.preflight: npm run lint && npm run rebuild:node && npm test && npm run rebuild:native
scripts.package:preflight: npm run preflight && npm run package
scripts.publish:vsce: npm run preflight && npm run clean:vsce-deps && vsce publish
scripts.publish:patch: npm run version:patch && npm run publish:vsce
scripts.publish:minor: npm run version:minor && npm run publish:vsce
scripts.publish:major: npm run version:major && npm run publish:vsce
